title: Comparable Company Valuation Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Comparable Company Valuation skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

identified_peer_set.description: Identified peer set of publicly traded comparable companies (minimum 5 peers)

current_market_capitalization.description: Current market capitalization, net debt, and enterprise value for each peer

ltm.description: LTM (last twelve months) and forward financial metrics for each peer: revenue, EBITDA, EBIT, net income

subject_companys_corresponding.description: Subject company's corresponding LTM and forward financial metrics

growth_rates_margins.description: Growth rates and margins for each peer (to support multiple regression or quartile selection)

transaction_comps_data.description: Transaction comps data for cross-reference against trading comps
